examples: In the meantime the protoplanet cores were proceeding to consolidate.
Gas clusters that push the protoplanet outward can sometimes exert stronger forces than those that push inward.
If a protoplanet was large enough, soon enough, its gravity would pull in the nebular gas, and it would become a gas giant.
In 2011, astronomers said they had discovered a protoplanet, though some signs indicated it was an older entity.
The protoplanet would take tens of thousands of years to grow up.
